parameters.name: ConfigType
parameters.description:
The configuration type. Use this parameter to query global or rule configurations. Valid values:

- global: Queries global configurations.

- rule: Queries rule configurations.

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: The page number. The default value is 1 if you do not specify this parameter.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: The number of entries per page. The maximum value is 500. The default value is 500 if you do not specify this parameter.

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: The site ID. For more information, see [ListSites](~~2850189~~).

parameters.name: SiteVersion
parameters.description: The version number of the site configuration. For sites with configuration version control enabled, specify the site version for which the configuration takes effect using this parameter. The default value is version 0.
